overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban environment. The camera follows different pedestrians through city streets, under overpasses, and across intersections with moderate futuristic vehicle traffic. Bright midday sun illuminates the neon-accented architecture and vivid pink pedestrian pathways.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: character transitions from walking to running to cross the multi-lane street
character crosses the road between moving futuristic vehicles

agents.ego_description: following a character in a green jacket and purple pants who walks under the overpass then runs across the street

notable_agents.action: character in green jacket walking forward then running across the street

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
smooth metal construction barrier wall running along the left side
tall distinctive building with green and yellow geometric facade visible in the distance
curved elevated highway structure with metallic supports

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete highway overpass with a metal wall on the left and traffic on the right. The camera follows a character in a green jacket walking along the shaded sidewalk. Near the end of the segment, the character breaks into a run to cross the multi-lane street between futuristic vehicles, transitioning from the covered walkway to the open road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with pink painted pedestrian path and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit street with pink sidewalk

agents.ego_description: following a woman wearing a pink sweater, denim shorts, and red thigh-high boots along the pink pedestrian path

notable_agents.action: woman in pink top and red boots walking steadily along the sidewalk

entered.detail: long wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art including large text
distinctive pink painted pedestrian walkway running along the street
orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the vehicle road

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the overpass into bright sunlight, following a woman in distinctive red boots along a vivid pink pedestrian path. The left side features an extensive graffiti-covered wall while futuristic traffic flows on the right. The scene maintains a steady walking pace through this moderately crowded urban corridor with cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalks and commercial buildings

events.description: approaching and entering a busy intersection with multiple crosswalks
camera switches from following the woman to following a man in tactical gear with an orange cap
crossing the street at the intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: initially following the woman in pink toward the intersection, then switching to follow a man in dark tactical clothing and an orange cap across the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: man in dark tactical outfit with orange cap crossing the street and continuing down the sidewalk

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing area at the intersection with textured pavement
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment transitions to a busy open intersection with dense pedestrian traffic. The camera follows the woman in pink as she approaches the crosswalk, then switches to follow a man in tactical gear with an orange cap. They cross the street together among other pedestrians, with digital billboards and commercial buildings visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with pink pedestrian path and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: following the man with the orange cap along the sidewalk, passing various pedestrians and parked vehicles

entered.detail: large dark-colored futuristic truck parked along the curb
street ascending into the distance with buildings on both sides

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the pink pedestrian path on the far side of the intersection, the camera follows the man with the orange cap past parked vehicles and commercial buildings. The street ahead slopes uphill, lined with digital billboards and street furniture. Pedestrians walk in both directions along this moderately busy urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded depths of a concrete overpass into a bright, neon-accented urban corridor. It begins beneath a highway structure, following a character in a green jacket along a shaded sidewalk before the camera accelerates as they run across a multi-lane street. As the camera emerges into brilliant sunlight, the scene shifts to follow a woman in red boots along a vivid pink pedestrian path flanked by a graffiti-covered wall and flowing futuristic traffic. The movement then expands into a busy open intersection where the focus transitions to a man in tactical gear and an orange cap crossing the street amidst digital billboards and dense crowds. Finally, the camera continues along the pink pathway, following the man past parked vehicles and commercial buildings as the street slopes upward into the heart of the city.
